summary: Video. Carried live footage (CNN and WFAA) of a Dallas DOJ press conference where ICE's Marcos Charles speaks about officers who ran into gunfire to reach detainees and speaks against anti-ICE rhetoric. It is a podium press-conference recording.
notable_text: CNN; 'FEDERAL INVESTIGATORS GIVE UPDATE ON DEADLY ICE FACILITY SHOOTING'; 'Marcos Charles | Field Office Director of Enforcement and Removal Operations'
